chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-980 of 2020 along with C.P. No. D-1519, 3922, 3981, 4268, 6109, 6455 of 2020 & D-3248, 3581 of 2021 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No. 25510/2020 2. For hearing of main case 11-02-2025 Qazi Umair Ali Advocate for the Petitioner in CP 1519/2020 Mr. Ahmed Ali Hussain Advocate for Petitioner in CP 3922/2020 CP D-3981/2020, D-980/2020, D-6455/2020 Syed Hamza Hashmi Advocate for Petitioner in CP D-6109/2020 and D-4268/2020 Mr. Arshad Hussain Shahzad Advocate for Petitioner in CP No. D- 3248/2021, D-3581/2021 Mr. Imran Ahmed Advocate for Respondent in CP D-3248/2021 Mr. Ameer Bux Metlo Advocate for Respondent Mr. Asad Aftab Solangi Advocate for Respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel these petitions impugn notices, however, they shall be contested before the issuing authority. Learned counsel seeks that the Petitioners be provided an opportunity of personal hearing wherein they may be able to articulate all their objections including without limitation their reliance upon 2018 SCMR 1328. Learned counsel for respective petitioners further seek that these notices be determined vide a speaking order and pending the aforesaid no coercive action shall be taken against the Petitioners. Learned counsel for the Respondent department articulates no cavil and states that these petitions may be disposed of in above terms. In view hereof petitions are disposed of. Office to place copy of order in each connected petition. Judge Judge Amjad PS
